title: Fit test - Onboarding Flow - Start Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test onboarding flow fails to proceed past Position screen when Test button is clicked on a supported device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Tap Onboarding to proceed through the onboarding flow.
4. Advance past the Pairing 2 screen to reach the Fit Test screen.
5. Verify that the Position screen is displayed.
expected: The Fit Test begins successfully from the Position screen after tapping the Test button.
